text:
How To Build a Remote-Ready Talent Funnel

By Abhishek Kaushik | Updated on January 18, 2025

As the global pandemic pushed us into an uncertain world, many organizations quickly switched to remote environments. A talent funnel is a theoretical pipeline that maps a candidate's movement from their first point of contact with your organization up until they're recruited.

Why should your talent funnel be remote-ready? The pandemic made it clear that businesses should implement remote fallback measures. One-third of Americans now view working from a physical office as something of the past. Remote and hybrid work models have been correlated with increased productivity and a better work-life balance.

8 best practices to build a remote-ready talent funnel:

1. Raise brand awareness - Glassdoor reported that 35% of hiring decision-makers are set to increase their branding spend. Organizations with a strong employer brand experience a 50% reduction in cost per hire and 28% less turnover.

2. Optimize your application process - Make the application process precise and seamless. Clearly communicate expectations on the job description.

3. Conduct phone screening - Phone screening helps filter out unqualified candidates in early stages. Typically 15-30 minutes. Ask candidates about their experience with remote work.

4. Leverage skills assessment tests - Tech employers can leverage skills assessment tests to optimize their talent funnel. Coding skill tests assess candidates for programming knowledge, creative thinking, problem-solving proficiency. Skill assessment platforms like WeCP let recruiters design custom tests for each tech role.

5. Maintain and nurture relationships with your talent funnel - Nurturing your talent pool is crucial. Provide individuals with value through professional development guidance, employment opportunities, helpful content.

6. Monitor your metrics and improve problem points - Measure talent funnel performance with quantifiable metrics including time to hire, cost to hire, offer to acceptance ratio.

7. Hire the best applicants from your remote-ready talent pool

8. Leverage remote onboarding for collaboration - Even if your organization operates primarily in-office, a remote workspace helps with emergency correspondence.

WeCP is an all-in-one tech recruitment platform that helps employers build remote-ready talent funnels with Auto evaluators, Real IDE with IntelliSense, Video proctoring, Load balancing, ATS and LMS integrations, and Code payback.
